---
title: "Measles Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
engine: jupyter
---

# Setup

```{python Import python modules}
import os
import logging

# Hide the noisy JAX CUDA initialization error on machines without a GPU
logging.getLogger("jax._src.xla_bridge").setLevel(logging.CRITICAL)
import pickle

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import pypomp as pp
from plotnine import *
from scipy.special import logit
```

```{python Load data in python}
PKL_PATH = "gpu_results/measles_results.pkl"
pomp_obj = pickle.load(open(PKL_PATH, "rb"))

# Fix for shadowed attributes from old pickles (can be deleted later)
for res in pomp_obj.results_history:
    for attr in ["CLL", "ESS"]:
        if attr in res.__dict__ and not callable(getattr(res, attr)):
            setattr(res, f"{attr}_da", res.__dict__.pop(attr))
```

```{python Make basic frame}
LL_frame = pomp_obj.results()
traces = pomp_obj.traces().rename(columns={"replicate": "rep", "iteration": "iter"})

id_vars = ["rep", "iter", "logLik", "method"]
param_cols = [c for c in traces.columns if c not in id_vars]
traces_long = traces.melt(
    id_vars=id_vars,
    value_vars=param_cols,
    var_name="quantity",
    value_name="param_value",
)
```

# Results

## Tables

### Summary
```{python}
pomp_obj.print_summary()
```

## Plot traces

```{python Set best_rep}
last_iter = traces["iter"].max()
best_df = traces[(traces["iter"] == last_iter) & (traces["method"] == "pfilter")]
if not best_df.empty:
    best_rep = best_df.sort_values("logLik", ascending=False)["rep"].iloc[0]
    print(f"Best replicate: {best_rep}")
```

```{python Plot traces}
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 10
(
    ggplot(
        traces_long, aes(x="iter", y="param_value", group="rep", color="factor(rep)")
    )
    + geom_line(show_legend=False)
    + facet_wrap("~quantity", scales="free_y")
    + labs(title="Parameter Traces", x="Iteration", y="Value")
)
```

```{python Plot traces (natural scale)}
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 10
def transform_params(df):
    df_transformed = df.copy()

    log_params = [
        "R0", "sigma", "gamma", "iota", "sigmaSE", "psi",
        "S_0", "E_0", "I_0", "R_0",
    ]
    logit_params = ["rho", "cohort", "amplitude"]

    mask_log = df_transformed["quantity"].isin(log_params)
    df_transformed.loc[mask_log, "param_value"] = np.log(
        df_transformed.loc[mask_log, "param_value"].astype(float)
    )

    mask_logit = df_transformed["quantity"].isin(logit_params)
    df_transformed.loc[mask_logit, "param_value"] = logit(
        df_transformed.loc[mask_logit, "param_value"].astype(float)
    )

    return df_transformed


traces_pertubation_scale = transform_params(traces_long)

(
    ggplot(
        traces_pertubation_scale,
        aes(x="iter", y="param_value", group="rep", color="factor(rep)"),
    )
    + geom_line(show_legend=False)
    + facet_wrap("~quantity", scales="free_y")
    + labs(
        title="Parameter Traces (perturbation scale)",
        x="Iteration",
        y="Value (transformed)",
    )
)
```

```{python Final parameter values}
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 10
final_params = traces_long[traces_long["method"] == "pfilter"]
(
    ggplot(final_params, aes(x="param_value"))
    + geom_density()
    + facet_wrap("~quantity", scales="free")
    + labs(title="Final Parameter Values", x="Parameter", y="Value")
)
```

```{python Plot LL traces}
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 6
(
    ggplot(traces, aes(x="iter", y="logLik", group="rep", color="factor(rep)"))
    + geom_line(show_legend=False)
    + labs(title="Log Likelihood Traces", x="Iteration", y="Log Likelihood")
)
```

### CLL and Observations

```{python}
# | fig-width: 16
# | fig-height: 6
cll_df = pomp_obj.CLL()
cll_col = "CLL" if "CLL" in cll_df.columns else "cll"
rep_col = "replicate" if "replicate" in cll_df.columns else "rep"

ys = pomp_obj.ys.reset_index()
time_col_in_ys = "time" if "time" in ys.columns else "index"
ys = ys.rename(columns={time_col_in_ys: "time_val"})
ys["time_idx"] = range(len(ys))

cll_with_ys = cll_df.merge(ys, left_on="time", right_on="time_idx")

exclude_cols = ["time", "time_val", "time_idx", cll_col, "replicate", "rep"]
obs_col = [c for c in cll_with_ys.columns if c not in exclude_cols][0]

cll_with_ys[obs_col] = np.log(cll_with_ys[obs_col] + 1)

cll_with_ys[cll_col] = -cll_with_ys[cll_col]

plot_df = cll_with_ys.rename(
    columns={cll_col: "-CLL", obs_col: f"log({obs_col.capitalize()}+1)"}
).melt(
    id_vars=["time_val", "replicate", "rep"],
    value_vars=["-CLL", f"log({obs_col.capitalize()}+1)"],
    var_name="measure",
    value_name="val",
)

plot_df["group_id"] = plot_df["measure"] + "_" + plot_df["replicate"].astype(str)

(
    ggplot(plot_df, aes(x="time_val", y="val", group="group_id", color="measure"))
    + geom_line(alpha=0.5)
    + labs(
        title="-CLL and Log-Observations over Time",
        x="Time",
        y="Value",
        color="Measure",
    )
)
```
